name: HMAS Wagga (J 315)
events: 13 Mar 1945 Around 1100 I/13, HMAS Vendetta (Lt. G.S. Gordon, RAN) was relieved on the A/S patrol off Humboldt Bay by HMAS Wagga (A/Lt.Cdr. C.J.P. Guille, OBE, RANR(S)).
After fuelling and watering, HMAS Vendetta departed Humboldt Bay for Madang around 1600 I/13.
HMAS Vendetta was to proceed to Australia for refit. (1)
